heading_path: Health care for women subjected to intimate partner violence or sexual violence: a clinical handbook
Health care for women subjected to intimate partner violence or sexual violence: a clinical handbook
paragraph_or_text_span: When providing first-line support to a woman who has been subjected to violence, 4 kinds of needs deserve attention: Immediate emotional/psychological health needs Immediate physical health needs Ongoing safety needs Ongoing support and mental health needs.
